parameters.query:
INSERT INTO deals (deal_id, company_name, sender_domains, deal_stage, deal_owner, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.company_name }}',
  ARRAY['{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.sender_domain }}'],
  'discover',
  'Austin Hollins',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO UPDATE SET
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING xmax

INSERT INTO ingestion_log (message_id, deal_id, doc_type, sender_email, subject, chunk_count, attribution_confidence, attribution_status, ingested_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}',
  'calendar_invite',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.organizer }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.subject }}',
  1,
  'high',
  'confirmed',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO calendar_events (google_event_id, deal_id, title, start_time, end_time, location, organizer, attendees, meeting_type)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.subject }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.start }}', '')::timestamptz,
  NULLIF('{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.end }}', '')::timestamptz,
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.location }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.organizer }}',
  ARRAY['{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.attendees }}'],
  'meeting'
)
ON CONFLICT (google_event_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  start_time = EXCLUDED.start_time,
  end_time = EXCLUDED.end_time,
  attendees = EXCLUDED.attendees,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING (xmax = 0) AS is_new_insert
SELECT DISTINCT doc_type FROM ingestion_log WHERE deal_id = '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}' AND doc_type != 'calendar_invite' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO deal_notifications (deal_id, notification_type, summary, context) VALUES ('{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}', 'calendar_alert', '{{ $('Code: Build Calendar Alert').first().json.message }}', '{"event_type": "calendar_invite"}'::jsonb)

INSERT INTO deal_notifications (deal_id, notification_type, summary, context) VALUES ('{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}', 'new_deal', '{{ $('Code: Build New Deal Alert').first().json.message }}', '{"source": "calendar_invite"}'::jsonb)
